__inputs.name: DS_GITHUB_GOVERNANCE_BIGQUERY
__inputs.label: GitHub Governance BigQuery
__inputs.description: Select the configured Google BigQuery datasource that can read the github_governance dataset.

description: Enterprise overview of curated GitHub governance events, review priorities, affected repositories, approved automation activity and critical security-control changes.

options.content:
### GitHub Governance Intelligence — Enterprise Overview
Curated, deduplicated and rule-versioned governance events. Use this dashboard for governance review and investigation—not as a security-incident console.  
**Default scope:** last 30 days · **Refresh:** 15 minutes · **Event time:** source `event_time`. Approved Cloud Platform automations remain visible as **LOW** priority.

panels.title: Total Governance Events
panels.description: All curated governance events in the selected scope.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(
      TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')),
      '/'
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '$organization'
  )
)
AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
AND ('$actor' = 'ALL' OR actor = '$actor')

panels.title: High / Critical Review Events
panels.description: Events requiring immediate or elevated governance review.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND review_priority IN ('CRITICAL', 'HIGH')
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(
      TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')),
      '/'
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '$organization'
  )
)
AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
AND ('$actor' = 'ALL' OR actor = '$actor')

panels.title: Critical Security-Control Changes
panels.description: Critical weakening or removal of Advanced Security controls.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND review_priority = 'CRITICAL'
  AND governance_area = 'ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE'
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(
      TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')),
      '/'
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '$organization'
  )
)
AND ('$actor' = 'ALL' OR actor = '$actor')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT
  TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', ''))
) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) != ''
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(
      TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')),
      '/'
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '$organization'
  )
)
AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
AND ('$actor' = 'ALL' OR actor = '$actor')

panels.title: Organizations Affected
panels.description: Distinct organizations derived from repository paths.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT
  SPLIT(
    TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')),
    '/'
  )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]
) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND STRPOS(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')), '/') > 0
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(
      TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')),
      '/'
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '$organization'
  )
)
AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
AND ('$actor' = 'ALL' OR actor = '$actor')

panels.title: Approved Automation Events
panels.description: Events matched by an active review exception, including approved provisioning bots.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` AS governance_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(governance_event.event_time)
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(
      TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')),
      '/'
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '$organization'
  )
)
AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
AND ('$actor' = 'ALL' OR actor = '$actor')
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_review_exceptions` AS exception
    WHERE exception.is_active = TRUE
      AND LOWER(exception.actor) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.actor, ''))
      AND (
        exception.action = '*'
        OR LOWER(exception.action) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.action, ''))
      )
      AND (
        exception.governance_event_type IS NULL
        OR exception.governance_event_type = '*'
        OR UPPER(exception.governance_event_type) =
           UPPER(COALESCE(governance_event.governance_event_type, ''))
      )
  )

panels.title: Governance Events Over Time by Review Priority
panels.description: Daily governance activity using source event time.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(event_time, DAY) AS time,
  review_priority AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(
      TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')),
      '/'
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '$organization'
  )
)
AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
AND ('$actor' = 'ALL' OR actor = '$actor')
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  COUNTIF(governance_area = 'BRANCH_AND_MERGE_CONTROLS') AS BRANCH_AND_MERGE_CONTROLS,
  COUNTIF(governance_area = 'ACCESS_GOVERNANCE') AS ACCESS_GOVERNANCE,
  COUNTIF(governance_area = 'OAUTH_ACCESS_GOVERNANCE') AS OAUTH_ACCESS_GOVERNANCE,
  COUNTIF(governance_area = 'IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY') AS IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY,
  COUNTIF(governance_area = 'ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE') AS ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE,
  COUNTIF(governance_area = 'REPOSITORY_SECURITY_POSTURE') AS REPOSITORY_SECURITY_POSTURE,
  COUNTIF(governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE') AS WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE,
  COUNTIF(governance_area = 'AUDIT_AND_EVIDENCE_INTEGRITY') AS AUDIT_AND_EVIDENCE_INTEGRITY
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(
      TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')),
      '/'
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '$organization'
  )
)
AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
AND ('$actor' = 'ALL' OR actor = '$actor')

SELECT
  COUNTIF(review_priority = 'CRITICAL') AS CRITICAL,
  COUNTIF(review_priority = 'HIGH') AS HIGH,
  COUNTIF(review_priority = 'MEDIUM') AS MEDIUM,
  COUNTIF(review_priority = 'LOW') AS LOW
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(
      TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')),
      '/'
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '$organization'
  )
)
AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
AND ('$actor' = 'ALL' OR actor = '$actor')

SELECT
  governance_event_type AS event_type,
  COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(
      TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')),
      '/'
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '$organization'
  )
)
AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
AND ('$actor' = 'ALL' OR actor = '$actor')
GROUP BY event_type
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 12

panels.title: High / Critical Governance Review Queue
panels.description: Final classifier priority after approved review exceptions are applied.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  event_time,
  review_priority,
  governance_event_type,
  action,
  actor AS initiated_by,
  affected_identity,
  SPLIT(repository, '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS organization,
  repository,
  review_reason
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND review_priority IN ('CRITICAL', 'HIGH')
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(
      TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')),
      '/'
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '$organization'
  )
)
AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
AND ('$actor' = 'ALL' OR actor = '$actor')
ORDER BY
  CASE review_priority
    WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 1
    WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END,
  event_time DESC
LIMIT 200

WITH scoped_events AS (
  SELECT
    SPLIT(
      TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')),
      '/'
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
    AND STRPOS(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')), '/') > 0
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(
      TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')),
      '/'
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '$organization'
  )
)
AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
AND ('$actor' = 'ALL' OR actor = '$actor')
)
SELECT organization, COUNT(*) AS events
FROM scoped_events
GROUP BY organization
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT
  TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) AS repository_name,
  COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) != ''
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(
      TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')),
      '/'
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '$organization'
  )
)
AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
AND ('$actor' = 'ALL' OR actor = '$actor')
GROUP BY repository_name
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT
  COALESCE(actor, 'Unknown') AS actor_name,
  COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(
      TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')),
      '/'
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '$organization'
  )
)
AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
AND ('$actor' = 'ALL' OR actor = '$actor')
GROUP BY actor_name
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 10

panels.title: Critical Changes by Security Capability
panels.description: Critical control disablement or removal after exceptions.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'PUSH_PROTECTION%' THEN 'Push protection'
    WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'ADVANCED_SECURITY%' THEN 'Advanced Security'
    WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'CODEQL%'
      OR governance_event_type LIKE 'CODE_SCANNING%' THEN 'CodeQL / code scanning'
    WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECRET_SCANNING%' THEN 'Secret scanning'
    WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECURITY_CONFIGURATION%' THEN 'Security configuration'
    WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDABOT%' THEN 'Dependabot security updates'
    WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'VULNERABILITY_ALERTS%' THEN 'Vulnerability alerts'
    WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDENCY_GRAPH%' THEN 'Dependency graph'
    WHEN governance_event_type = 'IDENTITY_GUARDRAIL_DISABLED' THEN 'SAML / 2FA guardrails'
    ELSE 'Other security control'
  END AS security_capability,
  COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND review_priority = 'CRITICAL'
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(
      TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')),
      '/'
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '$organization'
  )
)
AND ('$actor' = 'ALL' OR actor = '$actor')
GROUP BY security_capability
ORDER BY events DESC

panels.title: Repositories with Security Weakening
panels.description: Repositories with High or Critical Advanced Security events.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) AS repository_name,
  COUNT(*) AS security_events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND governance_area = 'ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE'
  AND review_priority IN ('CRITICAL', 'HIGH')
  AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) != ''
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(
      TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')),
      '/'
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '$organization'
  )
)
AND ('$actor' = 'ALL' OR actor = '$actor')
GROUP BY repository_name
ORDER BY security_events DESC
LIMIT 12

panels.title: Recent Critical Security-Control Changes
panels.description: Manual or non-exempt critical weakening of security and identity guardrails.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  event_time,
  governance_event_type,
  action,
  actor AS initiated_by,
  SPLIT(repository, '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS organization,
  repository,
  review_priority,
  review_reason
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND review_priority = 'CRITICAL'
  AND (
    governance_area = 'ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE'
    OR governance_event_type = 'IDENTITY_GUARDRAIL_DISABLED'
  )
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(
      TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')),
      '/'
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '$organization'
  )
)
AND ('$actor' = 'ALL' OR actor = '$actor')
ORDER BY event_time DESC
LIMIT 200

list.name: organization
list.label: Organization
list.query:
WITH repository_paths AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) AS repository_path
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) != ''
)
SELECT organization
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS organization, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT
    SPLIT(repository_path, '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS organization,
    1 AS sort_order
  FROM repository_paths
  WHERE STRPOS(repository_path, '/') > 0
)
ORDER BY sort_order, organization
LIMIT 5000
list.definition:
WITH repository_paths AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) AS repository_path
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) != ''
)
SELECT organization
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS organization, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT
    SPLIT(repository_path, '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS organization,
    1 AS sort_order
  FROM repository_paths
  WHERE STRPOS(repository_path, '/') > 0
)
ORDER BY sort_order, organization
LIMIT 5000

list.name: actor
list.label: Actor
list.query:
SELECT actor_name
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS actor_name, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT actor AS actor_name, 1 AS sort_order
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND actor IS NOT NULL
    AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(
      TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')),
      '/'
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '$organization'
  )
)
)
ORDER BY sort_order, actor_name
LIMIT 10000
list.definition:
SELECT actor_name
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS actor_name, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT actor AS actor_name, 1 AS sort_order
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND actor IS NOT NULL
    AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(
      TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')),
      '/'
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '$organization'
  )
)
)
ORDER BY sort_order, actor_name
LIMIT 10000

title: GitHub Governance Overview
